_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.

JP Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect remains a broader gap-discovery tier, not a locked recall baseline.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: 決算前ブラックアウト
サイバーインシデント第1報

must_not_detect.reason: Negated MAC mention; per rule do not label Material Adverse Change when negated.

uncertain.reason: Japanese honorific ‘さん’ indicates an individual, but named_person rule restricts to Mr/Ms etc or signature block.
Device identifier/asset tag; format is nonstandard and may not be covered by current detectors.
Audit log reference works as an internal tracking ID; mapping to the internal_session_id rule is ambiguous.
Masked My Number example; may be treated as minimisation rather than PII; detection boundary unclear.
Employee ID with spaces could challenge strict pattern detectors; semantically an employee identifier.
